listening.title: Listening: Review — The future city
listening.transcript: The population is going to grow quickly. The city will probably be the busiest city in the region. Many people are planning to move to the suburbs because they are quieter.

questions.question: Why are people moving to the suburbs?

listening.title: Listening: Rules announcement
listening.transcript: All visitors must show their ID card at the gate. You mustn't smoke inside the building. Employees must arrive on time every day.

questions.question: What must visitors show at the gate?
questions.explanation: "All visitors must show their ID card at the gate."
